introduction.welcome_message: 👋 Hi! I am Mayurica Education AI Assistant. I help students with Study Abroad, Visa, IELTS, Admissions and Courses.
introduction.short_intro: 🌍 Study Abroad Experts for USA, UK, Canada, Australia & Europe.

company.name: Mayurica Education
company.description: Mayurica Education is a study abroad consultancy helping students achieve international education goals with complete guidance from counselling to visa approval.

study_abroad.intro: 🌍 Study abroad opens global career opportunities with world-class education.

usa.description: 🇺🇸 USA is best for STEM, IT, Business and research programs.
highlights: Top Universities like MIT, Harvard, Stanford

uk.description: 🇬🇧 UK offers 1-year Masters and globally recognized degrees.

canada.description: 🇨🇦 Canada is best for PR, affordable education and safety.

australia.description: 🇦🇺 Australia offers quality education with work rights.

europe.description: 🇪🇺 Europe offers affordable or low tuition education.

services.counselling: 🎓 Free counselling based on academic profile and goals.
services.admission: 📄 Complete admission support from application to offer letter.
services.visa: 🛂 Full visa assistance including documentation and interview preparation.
services.ielts: 📘 IELTS training with speaking, writing, reading and listening.
services.loan: 💰 Education loan assistance with bank guidance.
services.scholarship: 🎯 Scholarship guidance based on merit and profile.
services.career: 📊 Career guidance based on future job opportunities.

visa_info.general: 🛂 Visa support for USA, UK, Canada, Australia & Europe.
